testcase.name: test_getters

failure.message:
numba.core.errors.TypingError: Failed in cuda mode pipeline (step: nopython frontend) Invalid use of none with parameters (array(float32, 1d, C), array(float32, 1d, C), array(float32, 1d, C), array(float32, 1d, C), float32) No type info available for none as a callable. During: resolving callee type: none During: typing of call at /workspace/repo/src/cubie/integrators/loops/ode_loop.py (1111)
File "src/cubie/integrators/loops/ode_loop.py", line 1111: def loop_fn( <source elided> if n_observables > int32(0): observables_fn( ^
During: Pass nopython_type_inference

testcase.failure:
loop_mutable = <cubie.integrators.loops.ode_loop.IVPLoop object at 0x741a515126f0> buffer_settings = LoopBufferSettings(n_states=3, n_parameters=3, n_drivers=1, n_observables=3, state_summary_buffer_height=0, observable...unters_location='local', state_summary_location='local', observable_summary_location='local', scratch_location='local') precision = <class 'numpy.float32'> solver_settings = {'algorithm': 'euler', 'algorithm_order': 1, 'atol': 1e-06, 'blocksize': 32, ...}
def test_getters( loop_mutable, buffer_settings, precision, solver_settings, ): loop = loop_mutable > assert isinstance(loop.device_function, Callable), "Loop builds" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

compile_extra return pipeline.compile_extra(func) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /opt/venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/numba_cuda/numba/cuda/core/compiler.py:125: in compile_extra return ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /opt/venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/numba_cuda/numba/cuda/core/compiler.py:172: in _compile_core raise e /opt/venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/numba_cuda/numba/cuda/core/compiler.py:161: in _compile_core pm.run(self.state) /opt/venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/numba_cuda/numba/cuda/core/compiler_machinery.py:386: in run self._runPass(idx, pass_inst, state) /opt/venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/numba/core/compiler_lock.py:35: in _acquire_compile_lock return func(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /opt/venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/numba_cuda/numba/cuda/core/compiler_machinery.py:338: in _runPass mutated |= check(pss.run_pass, internal_state) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /opt/venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/numba_cuda/numba/cuda/core/typed_passes.py:124: in type_inference_stage errs = infer.propagate(raise_errors=raise_errors) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <numba.cuda.core.typeinfer.TypeInferer object at 0x741b05352690> raise_errors = True
def propagate(self, raise_errors=True): newtoken = self.get_state_token() oldtoken = None # Since the number of types are finite, the typesets will eventually # stop growing.
while newtoken != oldtoken: self.debug.propagate_started() oldtoken = newtoken # Errors can appear when the type set is incomplete; only # raise them when there is no progress anymore. errors = self.constraints.propagate(self) newtoken = self.get_state_token() self.debug.propagate_finished() if errors: if raise_errors: force_lit_args = [ e for e in errors if isinstance(e, ForceLiteralArg) ] if not force_lit_args: > raise errors[0] E numba.core.errors.TypingError: Failed in cuda mode pipeline (step: nopython frontend) E Invalid use of none with parameters (array(float32, 1d, C), array(float32, 1d, C), array(float32, 1d, C), array(float32, 1d, C), float32) E No type info available for none as a callable. E During: resolving callee type: none E During: typing of call at /workspace/repo/src/cubie/integrators/loops/ode_loop.py (1111) E E E File "src/cubie/integrators/loops/ode_loop.py", line 1111: E def loop_fn( E <source elided> E if n_observables > int32(0): E observables_fn( E ^ E E During: Pass nopython_type_inference
/opt/venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/numba_cuda/numba/cuda/core/typeinfer.py:1154: TypingError

testcase.name: test_specialize_and_compile_records_timing
testcase.failure:
factory_with_settings = <tests.test_CUDAFactory.factory.<locals>.ConcreteFactory object at 0x741a734851f0>
@pytest.mark.nocudasim def test_specialize_and_compile_records_timing(factory_with_settings): """Test that specialize_and_compile records compilation timing.""" @cuda.jit(device=True) def sample_device(x, y): return x[0] + y[0]
factory_with_settings.build = lambda: testCache(device_function=sample_device) factory = factory_with_settings _default_timelogger.register_event("compile_test", "compile", "Test compilation")
# Call specialize_and_compile factory.specialize_and_compile(sample_device, "compile_test")
# Verify timing was recorded logger = factory._timing_start.__self__ duration = logger.get_event_duration("compile_test") > assert duration is not None E assert None is not None
tests/test_CUDAFactory.py:355: AssertionError
